description: Style NoteThese numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt.Product Details Round toed, white shoe with lace up stylingSynthetic upper with reinforced overlay at the heel collar and rubber covering for the toe boxPadded collar and tongue Rubber midsole TPU outsole with herringbone lugs at the forefoot and midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush Do not store in direct sunlight
